title: AI/ML | Backend Intern
content: Developed and deployed a production-ready machine learning pipeline, researching and integrating optimal Large Language Models (LLMs) to extract actionable market insights from written user reviews.
Implemented clustering algorithms to categorize unstructured data into hierarchical key drivers and sub-drivers, iteratively refining the system architecture based on cross-functional team feedback.
Engineered a testing framework by conducting comprehensive unit and functional testing, validating data flow across isolated checkpoints to ensure accuracy and codebase maintainability.
